title: Cuneiform Tablet #0167: Ur III Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Ur III period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Ur III period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Ur III period administrative or literary practice.
